candidates.why: This appears to be the summary D&A line for SG&A-related equipment/intangible assets, because its values closely match the sum of the two component rows beneath it: Depreciation and Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill. It also appears outside the selected parent row General administrative expenses, whose balancing structure suggests those D&A amounts are not embedded there. Per the summary-vs-components rule, prefer this summary row only.
Likely a component of the summary row equipment and intangible assets, so selecting it separately would risk double counting.
